promoted_facts.fact: McDonald's received $39,008,767 in loan guarantee service fees, cashless incentives, and beverage supplier rebates in 2024
Franchisee and spouse personal guarantee required for Bank of America loans; default on loans = default under Franchise Agreement; franchisee waives all claims against McDonald's under OAPA
Interest on delinquencies: 15% annual rate or max legal rate, monthly compounding
9 of 31 McOpCo sales in 2024 exceeded high end of Item 7 investment range by $65,593 to $2,035,816
Holding over after lease expiration: double rent as liquidated damages
Co-investment Option 2 for new restaurants: 12.50% floor with partial refund if year-1 sales projections not met by year 3
Accelerating the Organization restructuring: $1.2M in 2024, cumulative $63.6M since inception
401(k) plan with employer match; unfunded nonqualified plans liability $151.1M; derivative hedges
Net intercompany payable to parent: $910.6M (separate from $2.4B payable arrangements)
STO/STR percentage rent tiered from 9.00/9.50% to 11.50% based on McDonald's total acquisition costs ($0-$1M+)
